news.title: ASX falls, led by banks and retailers; Northern Star soars on Elliott investor push
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket slumped in early trade as oil held its biggest gain in about a month, as uncertainty about the state of US-Iran peace talks lingers.

news.title: TMK strengthens commercial muscle as Mongolian gas play matures
news.snippet: TMK Energy has appointed Origin and Santos gas veteran Danny Chong as production manager as its Mongolian gas play matures.

news.title: True North hits 51m copper zone near Qld Cloncurry mine
news.snippet: True North Copper has revealed wide copper and gold hits up to 51 metres from a recently completed exploration drilling campaign at its Queensland Cloncurry project.

news.title: Fair Work Commission lifts minimum wage by 4.75 per cent
news.snippet: Millions of Australians have been handed a pay rise, and the lowest-paid workers are getting the biggest bump.

news.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI: What if one of the mega AI IPOs fizzles?
news.snippet: The companies driving artificial intelligence need access to ever-increasing amounts of capital at ever-increasing valuations. That makes them vulnerable.

news.title: Amazon, eBay, Kogan ordered to halt sales of potentially deadly toys
news.snippet: Australia’s consumer watchdog has ordered online retailers to halt sales of a range of toys and games products - including chess sets - marketed for children that contain potentially deadly magnets if swallowed.

news.title: Trump needs to eat humble pie and make a deal
news.snippet: Trump needs to move on to other things so that by this time next year, today’s global energy panic will be seen as just another passing squall.

news.title: Foran get Manly's top job, Origin rep signs with two clubs in one day
French Open boss backs line judges after fan spots missed call
Meg Lanning gets AI slop treatment in team promo
French Open Sabalenka's for the taking as draw opens up for number one
This brother and sister helped start a company five years ago. Now they are worth $11 billion each
news.snippet: The seven founders of an AI juggernaut, including a pair of siblings, have just jumped into the ranks of the world’s 500 richest people. And now the company has set its sights on Wall Street.
